title: Fetch OpenAPI spec
description: Retrieve and format an API spec where exposed intentionally.

title: Common API paths
description: Discover common API paths in a permitted lab.

title: POST JSON login
description: Send JSON login request in a lab.

title: Simple rate-limit loop
command: for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' https://{{DOMAIN}}/api/login; done
description: Check whether a lab endpoint returns limiting responses.

title: Change object id manually
description: Authorized lab test for object-level authorization.

title: GraphQL introspection query
description: Check GraphQL introspection in authorized labs.

title: Decode JWT locally
command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import jwt
print(jwt.decode('{{TOKEN}}', options={"verify_signature": False}))
PY
description: Decode token claims locally without verification.
